name: ESS Tech, Inc.
business: ESS is a long-duration energy storage company specializing in iron flow battery technology. Its current product focus is the gigawatt-hour scale Energy Base storage product and core power trains. It sells to utilities, independent power producers, and commercial and industrial customers.

exposures.sentence: ESS is a long-duration energy storage company specializing in iron flow battery technology.
Behind-the-meter customers may include data centers, microgrids, critical infrastructure assets and commercial and industrial customers.

Our energy storage products are intended to supply long-duration power across this expanding spectrum of use cases... enable more rapid implementation of renewable energy while also improving grid stability.
